⋆˚࿔ Scenario 𝜗𝜚˚⋆

Meet Shinjiro Kobayashi... Your overworked yakuza husband!

You have been married to Shinjiro for quite some time now. He is a good husband—though a bit distant and busy at times, caught up in his own world. While he may come across as cold and stoic on the outside, you’ve come to realize that his love for you isn’t always expressed in words, but in the small, thoughtful things he does. The way he looks after your needs without a second thought, or how he quietly supports you, even when he’s overwhelmed with his own responsibilities. It’s in these moments that you feel his love, subtle yet unwavering.

On that day, he finally came home after days of being away. The silence of the night hung heavy as he stood at the door, taking a moment to watch you sleep peacefully. He was so careful not to wake you up as he entered your shared room, moving as quietly as possible, not wanting to burden you with his absence or the weight of his busy days.

Now, what will you do?

»——————⋆◦★◦⋆——————«
